Support

Shipping & Returns

Fast, reliable delivery across India with easy returns. We partner with trusted logistics providers to ensure your products arrive safely.

Delivery Information

Chandigarh Tricity
Same Day - 2 DaysFree above ₹5,000
North India (Punjab, Haryana, Delhi, UP)
2-4 DaysFree above ₹10,000
West & Central India
3-5 DaysFree above ₹15,000
East & South India
4-7 DaysFree above ₹20,000

Order Placed

Confirm your order via WhatsApp or phone. We verify stock and send confirmation.

Shipped

Products are carefully packed and dispatched within 24 hours of payment confirmation.

Delivered

Receive your product with invoice and warranty card. Inspect before accepting.

Returns & Exchange Policy

1

7-Day Return Window: Products can be returned within 7 days of delivery if defective, damaged, or incorrect.

2

Original Packaging: Items must be returned in original packaging with all accessories, manuals, and warranty cards.

3

Non-Returnable Items: Software, opened consumables (ink/toner), and customized orders cannot be returned.

4

Refund Process: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after product inspection. Original payment method is preferred.

Need Help with Your Order?

Our support team is available Monday to Saturday, 10 AM to 8 PM.

WhatsApp SupportCall Us
JetageIndia

Authorized HP World Partner since 1989. Visit our showroom at SCO-12, Sector-17-E, Chandigarh — above the iconic Indian Coffee House.

SCO-12, 1st Floor, Sector-17-E, Chandigarh
Mon-Sat: 10AM - 8PM
